titleStmt.title: SII 18.178: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 178. (B.K. No. 175 of 1933-34.) KAṆṆŪR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the 7th regnal year of Tribhuvanamalla Bij[j*]aladēva, Subhānu, Pushya śu. [8], Monday, solar eclipse. Evidently the date is wrong. There was however a lunar eclipse on Pushya Pūrṇimā of the year Subhānu corresponding to A.D. 1163, December 12, Thursday. This probably is the date intended.

It records a grant of land to the god Svayaṁbhu-Chaṇḍēśvaradēva of Kaṁnavūri made with the permission of the king, by Maduvaṇa-Nāyaka, the Sarvādhikāri of Pasāyita Kundaya-Nāyaka, and by a certain Maila-gāvuṇḍa. Another grant made to god Nārāyaṇadēva is also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu kaḻacaryyabhajabaḻacakravartti tribhuvanama
llabijaladēvavarṣada 7 neya subhānusaṁvatsarada puśyasuddha 8 mi
sōmavāra sūryyagrahaṇa parvvanimittadiṁ śrīmatu
pasāitaṁ kuṁdayanāyakana śarvvādhikāri maduvaṇa
nāyakaruṁ Arasarggebiṁnapaṁgeydu kaṁnavūriya śrīsvayaṁbhu
caṁḍēsvaradēvargge prabhumukhyavāgi vuriṁge baḍagalu hālu
maṁḍagegesarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa mattaru 12 sonna hirigere
kuḍi Okkaligara mailagāvuṁḍa mahapasāita kuṁdayanāya
kaṁge madavaṇanāyakaṁge biṁnapaṁgeydu prabhumukhyavāgi naṁ
dādīvigege śarvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭa mattaru 12 nārāyaṇadēva
rgge śarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭa mattaru 3 Antu 15 ©
Digital edition of SII 18.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
